chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 306 of 2022 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case: 1. For order on Misc. Application No. 6513/2022 (Urgency Application). 2. For order on office objection alongwith reply at flag “A”. 3. For order on Misc. Application No. 6514/2022 (Exemption Application). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For order on Misc. Application No. 6515/2022 (Stay Application). ------------------ 30.05.2022 Mr. Molvi Iqbal Haider, advocate for applicant. ------------------ 1. Urgency application is granted. 2 Deferred. 3. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. This Cr. Misc. Application is directed against the order, dated 16.05.2022, whereby the learned IV-Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Karachi-East dismissed Cr. Misc. Application No. 1571/2022, filed by the applicant under section 22-A & B, Cr.P.C. seeking, inter alia, direction to respondent No. 1 (S.H.O. P.S. Shahrah-e-Faisal Karachi) to record his statement under section 154, Cr.P.C. and register F.I.R. against the private respondents/proposed accused persons under relevant provisions of P.P.C. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant failed to make out from the contents of his application, filed under section 22-A & B, Cr.P.C, any cognizable offence allegedly committed by the private respondents/proposed accused for that he prays for the registration of F.I.R. against them; hence instant Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine, along with listed application being devoid of any merit. JUDGE Athar Zai
